title: [Question] Does exceljs supports JSON to XLSX and XLSX to JSON?
author: kalyanmantri
body: I am using v1.12.0 of exceljs.. does it support JSON to XLSX conversion and XLSX to JSON conversion?

comments.author: Siemienik
Siemienik
comments.body: hmm.. we currently have `v3.8.0`, are you thinking about an update?
